title: Sharks!
description: Turns the Nautilus into a Shark
body:
![Shark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba831eae00ea94a7bfd8f1728aafd1ab2b9413a.png)

# Features in this pack
Turns the Nautilus into a Shark and the Zombie Nautilus into a Drowned Shark

Turns the Nautilus Shell into a Shark tooth

Changes the Nautilus armor to better fit the Shark model 

Changes Most of the Nautilus sounds to sound more eerie (the hurt and death sounds are not changed)

Changes the effect "Breath of the Nautilus" to "Shark's Gills"

## This pack requires [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
